titleStmt.title: SII 26.713: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 713. (A.R. No. 662 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulōttuṅgachōḷadēva III: Year 16, Mīṉa (Paṅguni) ba. 1, Wednesday, Hastam = 1194 A.D., March 9.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in several places. It refers to the king as ‘who was pleased to take Madurai and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya’.

It records that the temple of the god Tirunalamuḍaiyār in Veṇṇāḍu, in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, in the balustrade on the southside of the Pugaḻābhara ṇa-maṇḍapa, an image of the god Tiruvuṇāḻigai Viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyār was set up by a certain Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyān alias Pāṟamativākaraṉ, of Tiruṉallam. It further records that the people (ūrār) of Pūṅguḍi alias Ōlaimaṅgalattuppaṉavaṉ-kuṇḍaiyūr, a dēvadāna, of the above-mentioned temple, and of Iḷanalattūr gifted away as iṟaiyili (tax-free) some lands in favour of the god Piḷḷaiyār. Of these people, those of Iḷanalattūr gave a piece of land in their village as archchaṉā-bōgam to the same deity. Then the names of a number of signatories are given. It then records another gift of land made probably by the people of the other village, although its details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ—tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅkoṇṭaruḷi
ṉa śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉāṟāvatu miṉanāyaṟṟu Aparapa[kṣat]tu pratamaiyum putaṉ
kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷaṉāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruna
lamuṭaiyār koyil pukaḻāparaṇantirumaṇṭapattu teṟkil kaiypuṭaiyil tiruṉallūruṭai
yāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānāna pāṟamativākaraṉāṉa Eḻuntaruḷivitta tiruvuṉāḻikai viṉāyakappiḷḷai
yāṟku Ittevar tevatāṉam pūṅkuṭiyāṉa Olaimaṅkalattup paṉavaṉ kuṇṭaiyūrum Uḷḷiṭṭa
ūravaromum Iḷanalattūravarromum Ivvaṉaivom Ippiḷḷaiyāṟku Iṟaiyili ceytu
kuṭutta nilamāvaṉa Iḷanalattūravarom Ippiḷḷaiyāṟkku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliya
y kiṭaṉta nilamāy Iṟaiyili viṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai Umaikkuṉ lā
ṉa vikkeśvarappiccan nilattuk kuḷaṟṟukkum teṉpāṟkkellai tevakaḷ tevaṉāṉa Ā
ṭavalāṉ paṭṭa nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Akapparivārāy peṇṭuka
ḷḷil karai Ēṟaviṭṭāḷ nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Uṭciṟuvākkālukku
teṟkum vaṭakkum Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuppaṭṭaṉilam mukkāṇiyum Aṉtarāyam
pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa Ippiḷḷaiyāṟku Accaṉāpoka Iṟaiyili viṭṭom Iv Ūravarom
Ip piramāṇam Eḻutiṉāṉ Ikkoyiṟk kaṇakku tiruvaḻuntūru�
vaṇkāṭu paṭṭar vaṭukkuṭai
yā Iḷanala vikkaṉatittāṉ vālai kiḻavaṉ nallattu kaḷ tirunākiśvaramuṭaiyāṉ
Āṭavalāṉ paṭṭaṉ poṟkoyiṟ paṭṭaṉ karaiyeṟaviṭṭa ḷukku Āka maṇalūr kiḻavan
āṭkoṇṭāṉ ṭaiyāṉ tiruvuṇāḻikaippiccaṉ nallaviṭaṅka mārāyaṉ vik
keśvarappiccaṉ pañcanetivāṇaṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉ vitiviṭaṅkappiccaṉ Eḻut tiṭṭa[§]
ṇappaṭi ṭaiyām Ūr
yāṟku Aṟcaṉāpoka Iṟaiyili viṭṭa nila yāṉa kaṇṇāṟṟukku
� ṟku comiṭaikkaṇṭattu Ūr yāya Ūravar Aṉupavitta nilamāka Ippiḷḷaiyāṟkup patiṉāṟā
vatu pacāṉa mutal Iṟaiyili viḷainilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai kiḷḷi Uṭai yāṉ nilattukku meṟku
m teṉpāṟkellai Aṉṉiyūr Ellaikku vaṭakku melpāṟkkellai kiḷḷi Uṭaiyāṉ nilattukku kiḻakkum
vaṭapāṟkellai tirunalamuṭaiyār kaṇṇāṟṟukku teṟkum Āka Icainta Iṉ nānkellaiyuḷ naṭuvu
paṭṭanilam Orumāvaraiyil meṟkaṭaiya Ippiḷḷaiyāṟku Iṟaiyili viṭṭa kaḻi koṇṭa
māvum Anta
varom Eḻutināṉ Ikkoyiṟ kaṇakku tiruvaḻuṉtūruṭaiyāṉ naraiveḷḷeṟuṭaiyāṉ nāṭaṟi pukaḻ
EḻutWritten below.tu Eḻuttiṭṭa IvvUr kiḻavaṉ AṟṟuḻAṉ pUṅkuTaiya ATkoṇTaṉAyakaṉ tirucciṟ
ṟampalapaṭṭaṉ paṭṭaṉ Uṟuppiṭṭu t tiruveṇkāṭu paṭṭaṉ kaṅkaiyuṭaiyāṉ veḷūr ki
ḻavaṉ tiruṉala
Digital edition of SII 26.713 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
